untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe analysis (higher timeframe pattern breakout + target progression + lower timeframe confirmation) which cannot be expressed in single-timeframe indicator logic. Requires: (1) higher_tf_target_progression threshold - undefined, (2) minimum_timeframe_ratio threshold - undefined, (3) pattern_confirmation_bars threshold - undefined, (4) explicit profit target threshold in R multiples - undefined. Source text is incomplete ('short spur'). Proxy conditions used ADX for trend confirmation and Donchian channels for breakout detection, but this does NOT capture the core multi-timeframe logic.
translation_notes: THRESHOLDS NEEDED: higher_tf_target_progression (%), minimum_timeframe_ratio (numeric), pattern_confirmation_bars (count), profit_target_R (multiple).
